name: Assembled Dimensions
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "[Image: Assembled-Dimensions.png]"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, please\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add fields to display the assembled dimensions of your products to your customers. Ideal for furniture retailers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install the assembled dimensions add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Product Management section, find the Assembled Dimensions add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up that appears."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Assembled Dimensions", "bold": true}, {"text": " section will appear in the product details page in the control panel:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On the product page, the dimensions and unit of measure appear under the "}, {"text": "Specifications", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shipping dimensions are used in shipping cost calculations and the shipping consignment / label generation. Assembled dimensions are for descriptive purposes only and are used to inform customers about the assembled dimensions of a product."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The difference between the two is easily demonstrated with flat pack furniture. A shelving unit will ship disassembled, but the assembled dimensions are important for customers to decide if the product is the right fit for them."}]}]
